changeSet.author: claude

or.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM system_role WHERE name IN ( 'TMMRD Lab Technician', 'TMMRD Researcher', 'TMMRD Pharmacognosist', 'TMMRD Lab Manager', 'TMMRD Principal Investigator', 'Bioanalytical Sample Receiver', 'Bioanalytical Chemical Analyst', 'Bioanalytical Pharmacist', 'Bioanalytical Researcher', 'Bioanalytical Lab Supervisor', 'Bioanalytical Study Director', 'Bioanalytical QA Officer', 'Bioanalytical Data Manager', 'GBD Sample Collector', 'GBD Laboratory Technician', 'GBD Junior Senior Researcher', 'GBD Lab Manager Supervisor', 'Bioequivalence Sample Receiver', 'Bioequivalence Chemical Analyst', 'Bioequivalence Pharmacist', 'Bioequivalence Researcher', 'Bioequivalence Lab Supervisor', 'Bioequivalence Study Director', 'Bioequivalence QA Officer' )

SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM notebook_page_allowed_roles WHERE role IN ( 'TMMRD Lab Technician', 'TMMRD Researcher', 'TMMRD Pharmacognosist', 'TMMRD Lab Manager', 'TMMRD Principal Investigator', 'Bioanalytical Sample Receiver', 'Bioanalytical Chemical Analyst', 'Bioanalytical Pharmacist', 'Bioanalytical Researcher', 'Bioanalytical Lab Supervisor', 'Bioanalytical Study Director', 'Bioanalytical QA Officer', 'Bioanalytical Data Manager', 'GBD Sample Collector', 'GBD Laboratory Technician', 'GBD Junior Senior Researcher', 'GBD Lab Manager Supervisor', 'Bioequivalence Sample Receiver', 'Bioequivalence Chemical Analyst', 'Bioequivalence Pharmacist', 'Bioequivalence Researcher', 'Bioequivalence Lab Supervisor', 'Bioequivalence Study Director', 'Bioequivalence QA Officer' )

changeSet.comment:
ROLLBACK: Remove all custom research lab roles, permissions, and permission levels.
This changeset undoes the custom RBAC implementations for: - Traditional Medicine (TMMRD) roles + permission levels - Bioanalytical roles + permission levels - Bioequivalence roles + permission levels - Genomics/GBD roles + permission levels
Rolls back changesets: - *-system-roles.xml (role creation) - *-page-roles*.xml (page-role assignments) - *-permission-levels.xml (permission level mappings) - *-add-*-roles-to-alllabunits.xml (lab unit assignments)
Rationale: Migrating to standard OpenELIS RBAC using generic functional roles + department-based access control instead of lab-specific role hierarchies.
This addresses Ethiopian server deployment issues where custom role creation failed due to Liquibase migration order dependencies.
References migration: frontend/src/components/notebook/pages/* (31+ components)

delete.where: role IN ( 'TMMRD Lab Technician', 'TMMRD Researcher', 'TMMRD Pharmacognosist', 'TMMRD Lab Manager', 'TMMRD Principal Investigator', 'Bioanalytical Sample Receiver', 'Bioanalytical Chemical Analyst', 'Bioanalytical Pharmacist', 'Bioanalytical Researcher', 'Bioanalytical Lab Supervisor', 'Bioanalytical Study Director', 'Bioanalytical QA Officer', 'Bioanalytical Data Manager', 'GBD Sample Collector', 'GBD Laboratory Technician', 'GBD Junior Senior Researcher', 'GBD Lab Manager Supervisor', 'Bioequivalence Sample Receiver', 'Bioequivalence Chemical Analyst', 'Bioequivalence Pharmacist', 'Bioequivalence Researcher', 'Bioequivalence Lab Supervisor', 'Bioequivalence Study Director', 'Bioequivalence QA Officer' )

role_id IN ( SELECT id FROM system_role WHERE name IN ( 'TMMRD Lab Technician', 'TMMRD Researcher', 'TMMRD Pharmacognosist', 'TMMRD Lab Manager', 'TMMRD Principal Investigator', 'Bioanalytical Sample Receiver', 'Bioanalytical Chemical Analyst', 'Bioanalytical Pharmacist', 'Bioanalytical Researcher', 'Bioanalytical Lab Supervisor', 'Bioanalytical Study Director', 'Bioanalytical QA Officer', 'Bioanalytical Data Manager', 'GBD Sample Collector', 'GBD Laboratory Technician', 'GBD Junior Senior Researcher', 'GBD Lab Manager Supervisor', 'Bioequivalence Sample Receiver', 'Bioequivalence Chemical Analyst', 'Bioequivalence Pharmacist', 'Bioequivalence Researcher', 'Bioequivalence Lab Supervisor', 'Bioequivalence Study Director', 'Bioequivalence QA Officer' ) )

role_id IN ( SELECT id FROM system_role WHERE name IN ( 'TMMRD Lab Technician', 'TMMRD Researcher', 'TMMRD Pharmacognosist', 'TMMRD Lab Manager', 'TMMRD Principal Investigator', 'Bioanalytical Sample Receiver', 'Bioanalytical Chemical Analyst', 'Bioanalytical Pharmacist', 'Bioanalytical Researcher', 'Bioanalytical Lab Supervisor', 'Bioanalytical Study Director', 'Bioanalytical QA Officer', 'Bioanalytical Data Manager', 'GBD Sample Collector', 'GBD Laboratory Technician', 'GBD Junior Senior Researcher', 'GBD Lab Manager Supervisor', 'Bioequivalence Sample Receiver', 'Bioequivalence Chemical Analyst', 'Bioequivalence Pharmacist', 'Bioequivalence Researcher', 'Bioequivalence Lab Supervisor', 'Bioequivalence Study Director', 'Bioequivalence QA Officer' ) )

role_id IN ( SELECT id FROM system_role WHERE name IN ( 'TMMRD Lab Technician', 'TMMRD Researcher', 'TMMRD Pharmacognosist', 'TMMRD Lab Manager', 'TMMRD Principal Investigator', 'Bioanalytical Sample Receiver', 'Bioanalytical Chemical Analyst', 'Bioanalytical Pharmacist', 'Bioanalytical Researcher', 'Bioanalytical Lab Supervisor', 'Bioanalytical Study Director', 'Bioanalytical QA Officer', 'Bioanalytical Data Manager', 'GBD Sample Collector', 'GBD Laboratory Technician', 'GBD Junior Senior Researcher', 'GBD Lab Manager Supervisor', 'Bioequivalence Sample Receiver', 'Bioequivalence Chemical Analyst', 'Bioequivalence Pharmacist', 'Bioequivalence Researcher', 'Bioequivalence Lab Supervisor', 'Bioequivalence Study Director', 'Bioequivalence QA Officer' ) )

name IN ( 'TMMRD Lab Technician', 'TMMRD Researcher', 'TMMRD Pharmacognosist', 'TMMRD Lab Manager', 'TMMRD Principal Investigator', 'Bioanalytical Sample Receiver', 'Bioanalytical Chemical Analyst', 'Bioanalytical Pharmacist', 'Bioanalytical Researcher', 'Bioanalytical Lab Supervisor', 'Bioanalytical Study Director', 'Bioanalytical QA Officer', 'Bioanalytical Data Manager', 'GBD Sample Collector', 'GBD Laboratory Technician', 'GBD Junior Senior Researcher', 'GBD Lab Manager Supervisor', 'Bioequivalence Sample Receiver', 'Bioequivalence Chemical Analyst', 'Bioequivalence Pharmacist', 'Bioequivalence Researcher', 'Bioequivalence Lab Supervisor', 'Bioequivalence Study Director', 'Bioequivalence QA Officer' )

rollback.comment: No rollback needed - this is the rollback changeset

changeSet.author: claude
changeSet.comment:
Drop permission_level column that was added exclusively for custom research lab permissions.
The permission_level column was added by: - 022-tradmed-permission-levels.xml - 049-bioanalytical-permission-levels.xml - 056-gbd-permission-levels.xml
Since we're removing the entire custom research lab RBAC system and this column is not used by standard OpenELIS roles, we should return the schema to its original state.
